title: Desert Panorama
description: Makes the main menu look better by adding a desert background.
body:
Reimagines the main menu with a snazzy desert background.

I used [Complementary Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) shaders, if you like the look of the pack you should check it out!

I used the seed -2974920134833304720 at coords 1400 72 -3600. (just in case someone wants to make a build there or something :))
